message:
feat: deliver SSH authorized keys via MMDS instead of baking into image

- Add ssh_authorized_keys field to proto API (CreateTaskRequest)
- Add SSHAuthorizedKeys to VMConfig, MMDSMetadata, CreateTaskRequest
- Update BuildMMDSData to include SSH keys in MMDS metadata
- Update stockyard-init.sh to fetch and install SSH keys from MMDS
- Remove hardcoded SSH key from Dockerfile

SSH keys are now passed per-VM at creation time, making the base image
generic and allowing different keys for different VMs/users.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -175,12 +175,8 @@ RUN mkdir -p /var/run/sshd \
     && sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config \
     && sed -i 's/#PubkeyAuthentication yes/PubkeyAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
 
-# Add SSH key for VM user (for debugging)
-RUN mkdir -p /home/${VM_USER}/.ssh \
-    && echo "ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIH3MQD2+f46FzfwZLiouCPkmcQGWmFBkc2d9aA4qjIMZ jesse@paradise-park.local" > /home/${VM_USER}/.ssh/authorized_keys \
-    && chmod 700 /home/${VM_USER}/.ssh \
-    && chmod 600 /home/${VM_USER}/.ssh/authorized_keys \
-    && chown -R ${VM_USER}:${VM_USER} /home/${VM_USER}/.ssh
+# SSH authorized keys are delivered via MMDS at runtime (see stockyard-init.sh)
+# This allows per-VM key configuration instead of baking keys into the base image
 
 # ============================================================================
 # Section 7: Stockyard Integration

@@ -43,6 +43,22 @@ if [ -n "$HOSTNAME" ]; then
     hostnamectl set-hostname "$HOSTNAME"
 fi
 
+# Get SSH authorized keys from meta-data
+SSH_KEYS_RAW=$(curl -sf "${MMDS_URL}/meta-data/ssh-authorized-keys" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
+SSH_KEYS=$(echo "$SSH_KEYS_RAW" | strip_json_quotes)
+if [ -n "$SSH_KEYS" ]; then
+    echo "Installing SSH authorized keys..."
+    SSH_DIR="/home/${VM_USER}/.ssh"
+    mkdir -p "$SSH_DIR"
+    echo "$SSH_KEYS" > "${SSH_DIR}/authorized_keys"
+    chmod 700 "$SSH_DIR"
+    chmod 600 "${SSH_DIR}/authorized_keys"
+    chown -R "${VM_USER}:${VM_USER}" "$SSH_DIR"
+    echo "SSH keys installed ($(echo "$SSH_KEYS" | wc -l) keys)"
+else
+    echo "No SSH authorized keys found in MMDS"
+fi
+
 # Get Tailscale auth key from meta-data
 TS_AUTH_KEY_RAW=$(curl -sf "${MMDS_URL}/meta-data/tailscale-auth-key" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
 TS_AUTH_KEY=$(echo "$TS_AUTH_KEY_RAW" | strip_json_quotes)
